chapter_title.ar: باب عِدَّةِ الْحُبْلَى الْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا وَ نَفَقَتِهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 44 – Waiting period of the pregnant woman widowed from her husband, and her expenses

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/195)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/195)
text: هُ قَالَ فِي الْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا تَنْقَضِي عِدَّتُهَا آخِرَ الْأَجَلَيْنِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Regarding the woman widowed from her husband, she would fulfill her waiting period as the later one of the two terms’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The waiting period of a widow ends with the end of the longer of the two time periods.’”
